content.json:
# 🏦 BNS Agent Analytics
Token usage, latency, GenAI calls and errors for the agentic financing app (`cloud_RoleName == bns-financing-agents`).

> Attribute keys follow OpenTelemetry GenAI semantic conventions. If token columns are empty, run the **Discover attributes** tile and adjust the `customDimensions[...]` keys.

content.query:
dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName == "bns-financing-agents"
| take 20
| project timestamp, name, duration, target, customDimensions

dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName == "bns-financing-agents"
| where tostring(customDimensions) has "gen_ai"
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions["gen_ai.request.model"]),
         in_tok = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.input_tokens"]),
         out_tok = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.output_tokens"])
| project timestamp, name, duration_ms=duration, model, in_tok, out_tok, operation_Id
| order by timestamp desc
| take 100

dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName == "bns-financing-agents"
| where tostring(customDimensions) has "gen_ai.usage"
| extend in_tok = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.input_tokens"]),
         out_tok = toint(customDimensions["gen_ai.usage.output_tokens"])
| summarize input_tokens=sum(in_tok), output_tokens=sum(out_tok) by bin(timestamp, 1h)

dependencies
| where cloud_RoleName == "bns-financing-agents"
| summarize p50=percentile(duration,50), p95=percentile(duration,95), calls=count() by name
| order by p95 desc

exceptions
| where cloud_RoleName == "bns-financing-agents"
| project timestamp, type, outerMessage, operation_Id, method
| order by timestamp desc
| take 100
